title: synostemon spinosus
intro: Synostemon spinosus, commonly known as the spinynose synostemon, is a plant species native to Western Australia. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Synostemon spinosus include its ability to treat skin conditions, such as acne and eczema, and its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. The plant is often prepared as a tincture or infused oil, which can be applied topically to the affected area or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
